import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; export default function Navigation() { const url = "https://fakestoreapi.com/products/1"; const [products, setProducts] = useState([]); const getDataProducts = async () => { const response = await fetch(url); const dataProducts = await response.json(); setProducts(dataProducts); } useEffect( () => { getDataProducts() }) return (
